concerns.text: SC-005 uses '[deferred]' which is acceptable for planning, but this is a spec. The threshold for acceptable dropped items needs to be defined quantitatively.  e.g., 'No more than 5% of benchmark items may be dropped...'
FR-006 contains a clarification request in brackets. While noting uncertainty is good, the spec should be updated to resolve this.  What authentication method will be used?
FR-007 states the system 'MUST log the failure'. What constitutes a 'failure' log? What information will be logged? This needs to be more specific.
FR-008 states the system 'MUST flag the snippet'. How will the snippet be flagged? What does 'flag' mean in this context? (e.g., log message, separate file, etc.)
